signals.headline: Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence
signals.raw:
Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

President Donald Trump confirmed a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran on Tuesday, April 7, suspending U.S. bombing and attacks to allow negotiations on a 10-point peace deal, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz[1][4][5]. signals.headline: No breaking confirmations on South Korea GDP or debt-to-GDP | NO | HIGH confidence**

Debt-to-GDP data covers 2025 settlement (1,304.5 trillion won), with projections nearing 60% by 2030; no new April 2026 GDP releases confirmed.[2]

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rises to 2.2%, below forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% amid Middle East energy volatility; this fresh data from Statistics Korea could shift prediction markets on BoK rate cuts or inflation targets.[1]
